body.raw:
# Link

Links are accessible elements used primarily for navigation. This component is styled to resemble a hyperlink and semantically renders an `<a>`.

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Link } from '@node-real/bee';
```

## Usage

```jsx
<Link>I'm a Link</Link>
```

### External Link

```jsx
<Link href="https://www.baidu.com" isExternal>
  go to baidu
  <LinkIcon mx="2px" />
</Link>
```

## Props

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: 'isExternal',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the link will open in new tab',
    },
  ]}
/>
